action_set_definitions.name: get_atmospheric_readings
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time methane concentration and airflow volume for a specific location.

location_id.description: The ID of the working face or sector (e.g., 'working_face_01').

action_set_definitions.name: get_infrastructure_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all fans and ventilation regulators associated with a specific sector and their current operational parameters.

action_set_definitions.name: get_active_alerts
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the SCADA system for active hardware malfunctions or safety protocol locks.

action_set_definitions.name: set_fan_rpm
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the RPM of a specific ventilation fan via SCADA.

action_set_definitions.name: set_regulator_position
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the opening percentage of a ventilation regulator/damper.

action_set_definitions.name: authorize_face_entry
action_set_definitions.description: Formalizes the safety clearance for a specific location, allowing equipment entry once conditions are verified.

state_description.fan_registry: Current operational status and RPM of all ventilation fans in the mine.
state_description.ventilation_regulators: Opening percentages of air doors and dampers controlling airflow distribution.
state_description.atmospheric_sensors: Real-time readings from gas and airflow sensors across different mine sectors.
state_description.cumulative_metrics: Aggregated system metrics such as total energy consumed.
state_description.alert_status: Active safety alerts or hardware malfunctions.
